parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify((() => { const p = $('Build blog payload').first().json; const { slug, ...rest } = p; return rest; })()) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, slug: $('Validate slug').first().json.slug, action: $('Check publish status').first().json.action, indexing: 'queued', url: 'https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/' + $('Validate slug').first().json.slug }) }}
